TextENGNew: When the lunch hour arrived, the classroom erupted into a boisterous chorus of cheers. Students opened their lunchboxes in clusters of friends, picking at each other's side dishes.
Naturally, our club members were no exception.
``All right! It's lunchtime!@k@vS14/01/210100001_002_01. Come on, Rena, push your desk over here!``

I hastily stowed away my textbooks and notebooks, then swung my desk around. Rena, as if she'd been waiting for exactly that, immediately lined her desk up against mine and produced an unusually large lunchbox from her bag.
``Whoa~, that's a huge lunchbox today, Rena!``
There was no way a single person could eat all of that. Of course, we all knew from the start that wasn't her intention, so we gathered around the lunchbox in a noisy circle.
``Ahahahaha!@k@vS14/02/210200002. Today, you see, I chose this big lunchbox because I wanted everyone to share!@k@vS14/02/210200003. Today's lunch is Rena's special homemade meatballs~!``
With that, Rena opened the lid, her face beaming with pride.
``Wh-whooooaaa!!``

What an appetizing color, gloss, and aroma! The towering mountain of meatballs was arranged without a single one out of place, beautifully complemented by the surrounding vegetables. It was dazzling!!

``What do you think, think?@k@vS14/02/210200005. I worked really hard preparing them last night, and they turned out so kyute!@k@vS14/02/210200006. I was having so much fun that I accidentally made a teensy bit too much.``
No, not a "teensy bit" -- that was unquestionably a "heaping mound."
But still! Before the ferocious, demon-like hunger raging inside me, a mere portion of this size stood no chance! With my hungry heart, I could obliterate this in seconds!
``Leave it to me, Rena!@k@vS14/01/210100004. I'll polish off every last one of your masterpieces!``
``Y-you can't have all of them~!@k@vS14/02/210200008. They're for everyone to share...``
``Now, now, hogging them all isn't very sporting, Kei-chan.@k@vS14/03/210300002. Club Rule Number Nine: 'Equal opportunity is a fundamental principle of competition!'``
``Hey, I've been meaning to ask -- just how many of those club rules are there, anyway? Why don't you show me the full list sometime?``
``Aahahahahaha!!``
Mion deflected with a laugh. ...She probably just made them up on the spot and forgot most of them. I bet there were plenty of duplicates in there too.
``Hey, Mii-chan, try some too?@k@vS14/02/210200010. I'm really confident about today's batch!``
``Ohhh~, sounds good to me.@k@vS14/03/210300005. If you're that confident, then this old man simply must have a taste.@k@vS14/03/210300006. Come on, Satoko, desk, desk.``
``Oh ho ho!@k@vS14/04/210400010. I'm terribly sorry, but meatballs happen to be a favorite of mine as well!@k@vS14/04/210400011. Prepare yourself, Keiichi-san -- you shan't have a single bite!!``
``What nonsense are you spouting?!``
Ignoring Satoko's bravado since she hadn't even gotten her chopsticks out yet, I seized the initiative and snagged a meatball dripping with sauce.
``Ha! Watch and learn, Satoko -- first strike goes to meeee!``
``Aah!@k@vS14/04/210400013. Chie-sensei is walking around stark naked!``
``What?!``
By the time it registered, it was already too late.
The meatball that had been at the tip of my chopsticks had been snatched away by Satoko.
D-damn iiiiit?!
That Satoko -- she exploited the split-second opening in my defenses!!
``Oh ho ho ho! Never let your guard down!@k@vS14/04/210400016. The very first meatball is always the most exquisite!!``
``Y-you snake, Satokooo!@k@vS14/01/210100010. Lying is the first step down the road to thievery, you know?!``
``...Honestly, Kei-chan, I think the real fool here is the one who fell for that.``
``Keiichi-kun... you really are such a boy... hau.``
``Wh-wh-what else was I supposed to do?!@k@vS14/01/210100013. You have to understand the pure heart of a young man who can't help but cling to every 'what if' and 'maybe'!``
``Yeah, yeah, yeah.@k@vS14/03/210300009. The pure and innocent heart of a pervert.@k@vS14/03/210300010. Got it, got it.``
H-hey, wait a second!!
Don't look at me with those cold eyes!!
``Oh ho ho!@k@vS14/04/210400018. Now then, while Keiichi-san is reeling from the damage, I shall help myself to more meatballs!``
``What'd you say?!``
``Well then, thank you for the foo--``
``Sorry, hold it right there.@k@vS14/06/210600002. I can't let you do that, Satoko.``
A hand seized Satoko by the scruff of her collar just as she lunged for the mountain of meatballs. When Satoko whipped her head around in shock, Shion stood there with a sly grin.
``Sh-Shion-san?!@k@vS14/04/210400022. Y-you're here again today?``
``Didn't I tell you?@k@vS14/06/210600004. I'm going to be looking after your diet for the time being, Satoko.@k@vS14/06/210600005. ...Now then, look here.``
Shion held up the cloth-wrapped tiered box she was carrying. The instant Satoko spotted it, her face contorted and she deftly edged backward toward the wall.
``E-eeeek?!@k@vS14/04/210400024. D-don't tell me what's inside is...?!``
``It's clear that you've been seriously lacking in vegetables lately, Satoko.@k@vS14/06/210600007. So I've taken the liberty of preparing a special squash lunchbox.``
``Ngaah?!``
``Oo~wah, that's practically bullying, Shion~.``
As I said that, Shion -- who had delivered divine retribution upon Satoko in my stead -- somehow looked, for the very first time, like a messenger of justice.
So God really does exist. Bless this merciful day.
``Come now, Satoko!@k@vS14/06/210600009. Your lunch is right here~!``
Meanwhile, Satoko kept shaking her head in refusal, her face pale blue with tears welling in her eyes, looking exactly like Munch's The Scream.
``U-uwaaah... I hate squaaaaash...!!@k@vS14/04/210400027. Waaaaaah!!``

``Now, now, this aversion to squash simply won't do!@k@vS14/06/210600011. Squash is extremely nutritious, you know.@k@vS14/06/210600012. A growing girl like you needs to be especially mindful of her nutrition, okay?``
``As long as I draw breath, I will not tolerate picky eating. I trust you're prepared for that.``
``Hoh~... Shion actually making a sensible argument. That's rare.``
``How rude, Sis.@k@vS14/06/210600015. Now, now, everyone, please help yourselves.@k@vS14/06/210600016. Nice and fluffy squash is sweet and delicious, you know~!``
We accepted the tiered box Shion held out, and one by one, popped pieces into our mouths as she urged us on.
...Hm? This is actually... pretty good...
``...Oh, it really is.@k@vS14/03/210300014. The way the dashi has soaked in gives it a wonderful flavor!``
``Mm-hm, it's sweet and really delicious!``

Mion and Rena both smacked their lips appreciatively. Don't underestimate this humble simmered squash -- without properly seasoning it in just the right amount of dashi, you couldn't achieve this texture and flavor.
Not bad at all, Shion...! The first time she brought squash salad, it was practically raw and so hard that even I pitied anyone who tried to eat it. But she's come this far!
``This is really good.@k@vS14/01/210100017. The squash's natural sweetness is subtle yet absolutely exquisite!@k@vS14/01/210100018. Satoko, don't you dare eat any -- it'd be wasted on you!!``
``Wh-what did you saaaaay?!@k@vS14/04/210400029. I may despise squash, but I despise the way you said that even more!!``
``Go on, go on!@k@vS14/03/210300016. Just take one big bite!``
It was an obvious provocation, but backing down was simply not in Satoko Houjou's nature. Furrowing her brow as hard as she could, she steeled herself and bit down with a determined chomp.
``Ngh, ngh...?``
``See?@k@vS14/03/210300018. It's good, isn't it?``
``...Mmmmm, well, I suppose...@k@vS14/04/210400032. It's not entirely inedible...``
Tilting her head with a hint of surprise, Satoko hovered her chopsticks in the air, deliberating whether to reach for another piece.

Watching this, Shion briefly flashed a huge grin and pumped her fist in a silent 'Yes!' -- but when she accidentally made eye contact with me, she gave an embarrassed cough and shifted back to her usual cynical smile.
``Well? Well?@k@vS14/06/210600018. Have I changed your mind a little?``
``...W-well, if it tastes like this, then perhaps... just a bit more...``
``Well, that first attempt of hers was pretty intense.@k@vS14/03/210300020. Making this much progress in such a short time is genuinely impressive!``

``Naturally.@k@vS14/06/210600020. I've been researching day and night to help Satoko overcome her hatred of squash.@k@vS14/06/210600021. Now then, at this pace, we should be able to conquer eggplant, bell peppers, and asparagus by the end of the year.``
``Urgh?!``
Satoko choked and coughed violently. Shion made a show of offering her tea while turning toward her with a sweetly devilish smile.
``There, there.@k@vS14/06/210600023. No need to rush -- there's still a whole mountain of squash waiting for you.``
``D-don't even joke about that...!!!@k@vS14/04/210400036. Why should I have to endure this torment during what's supposed to be a pleasant lunch break?!``

``This isn't torment at all.@k@vS14/06/210600025. Didn't Coach say something about this?@k@vS14/06/210600026. 'When things feel tough, just imagine you're a maid receiving strict training from your master.@k@vS14/06/210600027. Once you do that, everything will start to feel happy.'``
``So Satoko, if you just picture yourself as a maid, everything will work out!``
Coach... what kind of logic is that? ...Is he trying to found some kind of maid cult?

Ever since I met him when he helped out with the baseball team, I've always thought he was a good guy, but... I'm seriously starting to wonder if it's safe to entrust the education of young people to him.
``H-hauuu~!@k@vS14/02/210200014. Maid Satoko-chan -- I wanna take her hooome~!``
And then there's this one...
``And so, Satoko!@k@vS14/06/210600030. With the mindset of a maid, let's challenge everything that comes our way!``
``Wh-what is that supposed to mean?!@k@vS14/04/VT4Ba_satoko1004. Never in my life have I seen, heard, or eaten such an outlandish theory!!``
``Shion...@k@vS14/03/210300022. Since when did you awaken to some kind of transcendent enlightenment?``
``About a year ago...``
Shion shot back instantly, but there's no way such a convenient secret technique could possibly exist in this world. Had something snapped inside her head?

``A-anyway!@k@vS14/04/VT4Ba_satoko1006. You go to a different school, Shion-san -- what are you even doing here at this hour?!@k@vS14/04/VT4Ba_satoko1007. Before managing other people's lives, you should sort out your own behavior first!``
Sensing she'd been cornered, Satoko counterattacked with her most logical argument.
But of course, this particular line of reasoning was utterly useless against someone as outlaw-ish as Shion. Instead, Shion snorted derisively at her, making Satoko shrink back with a 'Hiii?!'
``B-but Shii-chan, this makes a whole week now, doesn't it?@k@vS14/02/210200016. I don't think the Okinomiya school is going to keep looking the other way... Are you really okay?``
``Oh, it's fine.@k@vS14/06/210600035. They've agreed to adjust my attendance records as needed.``
``A-adjust... you don't mean...?!``
``Heh heh heh... With the Sonozaki name and its power behind you, one little school is child's play.``
``Y-you're resorting to extralegal measures...!``
Shion said something terrifying with a perfectly composed expression.
I-indeed, if you wield the power of the Sonozaki family, you could do just about anything...
N-no, more importantly, this is Shion we're talking about. She'd probably amassed a mountain of blackmail material on not just her homeroom teacher but even the principal!
This girl really is... a terrifying person to have as an enemy...!
``So you see, Satoko's concerns are a non-issue.@k@vS14/06/210600038. Please don't trouble yourself.``
``Th-then I'll transfer to the Okinomiya school instead...!!``
``Oh, that would be even more convenient.@k@vS14/06/210600040. You're welcome to ride with my driver to and from school, you know.``
``Let's attend together, shall we? My school.@k@vS14/06/210600042. ...Together.``
``Y-your jokes are completely out of line~~~!!``
``...Oops!@k@vS14/06/210600044. You're not making any progress at all!``

With every single counterargument deflected, Satoko fled half in tears. But Shion quickly cut off her escape by circling ahead to the exit, slowly cornering the panicking Satoko into a corner of the classroom.
``Ahahaha!@k@vS14/02/210200018. It's so lively again today! Today!``
Indeed, this was becoming a familiar sight.
At this point, the students had even started a betting pool -- wagering anime and baseball trading cards on how many minutes it would take before Satoko got caught.
In fact, Mion had climbed up to the teacher's podium and was rapidly scrawling odds on the blackboard, looking every bit the professional bookie as she rallied the younger students.

``All right, listen up! Under three minutes pays three to one!@k@vS14/03/210300026. Ten minutes pays five to one!@k@vS14/03/210300027. And if she actually manages to escape, it's a whopping five hundred to one!@k@vS14/03/210300028. Hand in your cards now -- betting closes soon~~!``
Taking charge even here, huh, Mion...?
By the time I looked away, Satoko had already been pressed flat against a locker, unable to move left, right, or backward -- one step from checkmate.
Shion was an opponent that even Mion couldn't match. For Satoko, talented as she was, she couldn't so much as step on Shion's shadow, let alone put up a real fight...!
``A-au au au au~~~!``
``Give it up, Satoko... you're completely outmatched.@k@vS14/01/210100020. And Shion, ease up on her already.``
``No can do.@k@vS14/06/210600046. Satoshi-kun entrusted me with this, so managing her health is my responsibility.@k@vS14/06/210600047. Picky eating will not be tolerated -- mark my words!``

Well... that level of dedication is admirable, I'll give her that. But did Satoshi really ask her to go this far? For a brief moment, an image of Satoko's brother -- whom I'd never actually met -- flashed through my mind, frantically shaking his head.
``But lately, Shii-chan really does seem like Satoko-chan's big sister, doesn't she!``
``Ahh~, if you want, I'll happily trade her to you.@k@vS14/03/210300030. I don't need a twin -- toss her out.``
``Ahahaha!@k@vS14/02/210200021. But the way she'll stop at nothing to reach her goals really does make her seem like Mii-chan's sister!``
Rena, was that supposed to be a compliment...? Mion looks thoroughly disgusted.
``...What's the matter, Mii-chan?@k@vS14/02/210200023. Did I say something weird? Did I?``

``There's no point getting angry at someone who doesn't even realize what she said...@k@vS14/03/210300032. Besides, I'm nothing like that tyrant!@k@vS14/03/210300033. Being lumped in with her is absolutely intolerable!``
``Aahahaha!@k@vS14/06/210600049. True enough -- Sis is heading straight down Loser Lane~!``
``Who are you calling a loser, huh?!``

``Well, in this world, as you'd put it yourself, Sis: 'the winners write history!'@k@vS14/06/210600051. Trump cards are meant to be infinite, and they only have value if you actually play them!@k@vS14/06/210600052. Am I wrong?``
changeReason: Original renders the proverb as 'Might is right!'; new translation uses 'the winners write history!' -- different philosophical points.

TextENGNew: ...At that moment, someone reacted to those words.
One was Mion. And the other was...!
``Hoh...?@k@vS14/03/210300036. So you stand by what you just said, no take-backs?``
``?? Of course I do.@k@vS14/06/210600054. Why do you ask?``
``You heard her, Satoko!``

Tilting her head at Mion's meaningful laughter, Shion turned back to face Satoko, whom she'd cornered. But Satoko had already plunged a hand behind her back into the locker and pulled something out, her face still downcast.
``Shion-san... did you not just say...@k@vS14/04/210400048. that 'trump cards only have meaning when you use them'...?``
``...Satoko?``
``In that case...@k@vS14/04/VT4Ba_satoko1009. how about thiiiiis?!``
Then, with a triumphant expression that made her near-tears from moments ago seem like a complete act, Satoko thrust it right before Shion's eyes!
The instant Shion recognized what it was, her smile vanished in a heartbeat, replaced by a rigid grimace.
Yes, the thing that made Shion recoil... was a can... labeled 'Genuine Beef Curry'?!
``Wha...? S-Satoko?!``
``Oh ho ho ho!@k@vS14/04/210400052. The tables have turned!!``
Satoko threw back her head and laughed, declaring her strategy a resounding success.
Normally, even if Satoko bolted like a startled rabbit, Shion would catch her in no time and force-feed her vegetables while she screamed and cried.
...But today, she'd purposely run around the classroom, deliberately letting herself appear cornered to lure Shion toward the lockers -- all for this moment?!
``Now then! You just said that being picky isn't allowed, didn't you?@k@vS14/04/210400054. Then you should eat this canned curry, Shion-san!``
``If you can do that, then I'll eat the eggplant, the bell peppers, even the asparagus!``
``Come on! Come on, come on, come on!!``

It was an extraordinary sight. The instant Satoko -- who had seemed on the verge of total defeat -- held up that can like a feudal lord's seal of authority, the previously overwhelming Shion began retreating step by step, visibly cowed...
changeReason: Original compares the can to 'a police badge'; new translation compares it to 'a feudal lord's seal of authority,' changing the cultural reference.

TextENGNew: And the contents? A flavor of curry that nearly everyone in the class loved?!
``Wh-what's wrong, Shii-chan...?@k@vS14/02/210200025. Do you... not like curry?``
``Heh heh heh...!``
``I guess you didn't know, Rena.@k@vS14/03/210300040. Shion absolutely hates canned food~.``
The moment she heard those words, Shion's shoulders jerked as if she'd been struck by lightning.
``...S-Sis... you told Satoko about that?!``
``Club Rule Number Two!@k@vS14/04/210400058. Anything goes in the pursuit of victory!!``
``Rgh... Sis!@k@vS14/06/210600062. What grudge do you have against me to pull something like this?!``
``Hmm~, grudges? I've got more of those than there are stars in the sky, but...@k@vS14/03/210300042. Honestly, I just thought it'd be fun.``
That's right... of course that's the reason, Mion. You've always been that kind of person...
``Plus, I bet on 'Satoko escapes.'@k@vS14/03/210300044. Sorry about that~!``
``M-Mii-chan... that's insider trading...``
``No problem at all -- it's all within my projections.``
Even in the face of Rena's pointed remark, Mion just whistled innocently.
``Oh ho ho ho!@k@vS14/04/210400060. Remember this well!@k@vS14/04/210400061. A trump card must be saved for the very last moment!!``
``Go for it, Satoko!@k@vS14/03/210300047. Today's the day you claim your first victory!!``
``Now then! Eat up, Shion-san!@k@vS14/04/210400063. Being picky is no good, you know~!``
``Come on!``
``Come on, come on!``
``Ggh... I wouldn't eat that nutritionally unbalanced junk food whether it came in a can or not!!``
``Wha-- You idiot!!!``
``...You really said it, huh.``
*stomp* *stomp* *stomp* *stomp* *stomp* *stomp*@r*stomp* *stomp* *stomp* *stomp* *stomp* *stomp*@r*stomp* *stomp* *stomp* *stomp* *stomp* *stomp*@r*stomp* *stomp* *stomp* *stomp* *stomp* *stomp*
*SLAAAAAAAM*
The moment the door was flung violently open, the figure standing on the other side was revealed.
Every single person in this classroom... no, everyone except one, immediately began to pray.
Yes... for the eternal rest of the poor lamb who had blasphemed against a god.
``You are... Sonozaki, Shion... san?``
changeReason: Original uses Western name order 'Shion Sonozaki'; new translation uses Japanese name order 'Sonozaki, Shion,' matching how a formal Japanese speaker would address someone.

TextENGNew: Slowly, soundlessly...

No, on the contrary -- in a single instant, like teleportation, that person -- Chie-sensei -- brought her face to within five millimeters of Shion's nose and fixed her with a wide-eyed stare, something like ectoplasm dribbling from her lips.
Even Shion instinctively tried to recoil from such overwhelming presence, but Chie-sensei clamped a firm hand on the back of her head and held her fast.
``Uh, uhhhhh, umm, umm, umm...!``
``...My, you really do look exactly alike.@k@vS14/22/211400004. You and Mion-san.@k@vS14/22/211400005. I have to wonder... are your personality and way of thinking just as similar...?``
With that, she slowly tilted her head with a rubbery creak, like something out of The Exorcist, and turned her gaze toward Mion, who stood frozen nearby.
The instant their eyes met, even though Mion had done nothing wrong herself, she went ramrod straight and shook her head violently from side to side, sweat pouring down her face in sheets.

``Th-th-th-that's absolutely not true!@k@vS14/03/210300052. Sh-she and I are completely different!@k@vS14/03/210300053. Total opposites -- like oil and water!@k@vS14/03/210300054. As incompatible as hydrogen and oxygen -- mix us together and boom, instant death!!``
Then Chie-sensei turned back to Shion with a broad smile... a smile so cold it could freeze the magma of an active volcano to absolute zero.
Shion -- the sole person here unfamiliar with this lord of terror's true horror -- finally seemed to sense mortal danger, her face going deathly white as she scrambled for excuses.
``Oh, uhhhhh, wellll!@k@vS14/06/210600073. T-today happens to be the anniversary of the Okinomiya school's founding!!@k@vS14/06/210600074. S-so I'm not skipping school at all!!``
``I-i-if you have any doubts, p-please confirm with the Okinomiya school principal!!@k@vS14/06/210600076. Shion Sonozaki's visits to this school follow completely l-legal procedures!!``
...Shion was desperately flinging excuses.
Watching her, I was genuinely impressed. To still be able to move her mouth under the full force of Chie-sensei's Medusa smile... Terrifying.
``S-s-so, today I was, umm, uhh, you see...!!``
``...None of that really matters.``

``Another school is perfectly fine.@k@vS14/22/211400010. Whether you're a transfer student from an American high school or a prototype maid robot on a test run from some research lab, I welcome all visitors.@k@vS14/22/211400011. In fact, there's no problem at all.@k@vS14/22/211400012. Welcome. Hehe.``

Chie-sensei's words were warm and all-embracing. ...Yet inversely proportional to that warmth, the temperature in the classroom continued to plummet. But no one dared point that out. Of course they didn't.
``Oh, i-i-is that... so?@k@vS14/06/210600080. Th-that's a relief... ah, ahahaha.``
``However.``
``A moment ago... I distinctly heard something in your voice, your tone, your cadence -- something that caught my attention... What was that about curry?``
``Umm, uhh... I-I can't remember... w-what I said...``
``Ah, ahaha...``

``It may have been just my imagination, so.@k@vS14/22/211400016. Please try to recall, and this time state it clearly, loudly, word for word, without a single lie.@k@vS14/22/211400017. Go ahead, please.``
``Uh, uhhhhh, uhh...!``
``Incidentally, a strict punishment awaits anyone who lies.@k@vS14/22/211400019. Please follow young Washington's example when he chopped down the cherry tree, and answer me honestly.``
``A-answer honestly...?``

``That is my wish.@k@vS14/22/211400021. Though, if you answer too honestly, you may end up like Sen no Rikyu -- forced to commit seppuku.@k@vS14/22/211400022. I'll warn you in advance to exercise proper discretion.``
...She's doomed either way?!
``Uh, umm, s-sensei, p-please calm down a little...``
``I am perfectly calm. My mind is clearer and cooler than it has ever been.@k@vS14/22/211400024. Rest assured.``
Sensei... that's not cool. That's cold. No -- frozen solid.
The entire class stood paralyzed before this horrifying spectacle. Even Mion and Satoko were shaking with dread at the unforeseen magnitude of the trap they'd sprung.
changeReason: Original says Mion and Satoko were 'afraid of springing an unexpected trap'; new translation says they were 'shaking with dread at the magnitude of the trap they'd sprung,' different temporal framing.

TextENGNew: This is bad... If this goes on, Shion's life will genuinely be in danger.
To hell with it -- I'm a man! With that resolve, I bravely raised my hand and stood up.
``Ch-Chie-sensei!``
``...Yes, brave hero Maebara-kun...?``
A shiver ran down my spine...!
The mythical Medusa couldn't possibly have been this terrifying. ...That was my genuine, heartfelt thought as Chie-sensei turned her sub-zero smile upon me.
In that instant, my blazing flames of courage froze solid in their exact shape and shattered into a thousand pieces.
``Uh, uhhhhh, umm...!``
D-don't give in...! I-I'm sure I read something in a children's book once -- at a moment like this, the hero steps forward and proves his worth by speaking up...!
``Sensei, I'm the one who said it!``
``Huh? ...K-Kei-chan?!``
``Uuu, I-I'm sorry, Kei-chan...!@k@vS14/06/210600089. You're doing this for my sake...!``
``It's fine -- I can't just stand by and let you get hurt, right?``
``Kei-chan...!``
...No, wait.
This is Shion we're talking about. Think it through a little more carefully.
``Sensei, I'm the one who said it!``
``That's right, Sensei! Kei-chan is the one who said it!!``
``Ahh~, you're such a pushover, Kei-chan.@k@vS14/06/210600093. Well, you really saved me there.@k@vS14/06/210600094. Aahahaha!``
changeReason: Original calls Keiichi 'good-natured'; new translation says 'pushover,' a meaningfully different characterization -- kindness vs gullibility.

TextENGNew: ...Yeah, forget it.
Still, I'd feel terrible just abandoning her... No choice, then.
``S-Sensei... I-I didn't hear anything, actually.``
``Really?``
``R-really...``
Chie-sensei stretched her neck toward me with a bizarre, rubbery motion -- like one of those long-necked yokai -- and stared me down. ...Is this person actually human?!
changeReason: Original says 'like some kind of ghost'; new translation specifies 'like one of those long-necked yokai,' using the more specific Japanese folklore reference.

TextENGNew: ``...Is that so?@k@vS14/22/211400029. It must have been my imagination, then.@k@vS14/22/211400030. Well then, everyone, enjoy your lunch.``
With that, Chie-sensei smiled and left the classroom. The instant she was gone, Shion, freed from her hellish ordeal, crumpled helplessly to the floor.
Fortunately, Chie-sensei had her back to me. Seizing the moment, I quickly pulled a notebook from my desk, scribbled a message, and held it up so Shion could see.
It read: 'Just praise it!!'
``...C-curry is...``
``...Curry is?``
``A-an extraordinary food...@k@vS14/06/210600097. The crowning achievement of human culture and wisdom...!``
After racking her brain desperately, Shion finally managed to utter that praise.
``...Indeed, that is an immutable theorem dating back to the dawn of humankind.@k@vS14/22/211400033. Then please, do share your thoughts on curry.@k@vS14/22/211400034. ...Go on.``
``...M-m-ma'am, I'll h-have curry rice...@k@vS14/06/VT4Ba_shion1002. F-four large servings, please...!``
...It was a desperate, off-the-cuff response, but the sheer absurdity of it left the entire class blinking in bewilderment.
Yet somehow -- perhaps it struck some chord unique to curry aficionados -- Chie-sensei's mood brightened instantly, and the suffocating tension in the room melted away.
``...Very well.@k@vS14/22/211400038. It was just my imagination, after all.@k@vS14/22/211400039. Well then, everyone, enjoy your lunch.``
With that, Chie-sensei smiled and left the classroom. The instant she was gone, Shion, freed from her hellish ordeal, crumpled helplessly to the floor.
``A-are you all right, Shii-chan?!``
``...Th-that took a quarter century off my lifespan...!!``
That didn't even sound like an exaggeration. If this were a manga, Shion's hair would have turned completely white by now.
changeReason: Original uses 'comic'; new translation uses 'manga,' more appropriate for the Japanese visual novel setting.

TextENGNew: ``H-honestly... I'd appreciate it if you thought before you spoke.@k@vS14/04/210400068. For a moment there, I truly feared the worst...``
``Whose fault do you think this is?! Whose?!!``
``E-eek!?!@k@vS14/04/210400070. I-if you come any closer, I'll use this agai--@k@vS14/04/210400071. Huh?!``
Satoko instinctively reached for her trump card can, but when her hand grasped nothing but air where she'd left it, she spun around in shock.
And sure enough, there stood--
``Could this be what you're looking for...?!``
Lips curved in a smile but eyes utterly devoid of warmth, Shion menacingly held up the can she'd swiped at some point.
Looking closer, deep furrows creased her brow and cold sweat beaded on her forehead. ...Did she really loathe canned food that much?!
``For now... let's just get rid of this.``
Shion hurled the can out the window.
``Aaaah?!@k@vS14/04/210400073. Y-you can't just litter cans like that!``
``Phew... you're right.``
``Well, since things have come this far, I suppose I'll have to get serious--``
*rumble* *rumble* *rumble*...!!!
A silvery-blue fighting aura erupted from Shion's entire body as she slowly advanced.
With each step she took, the floor didn't so much creak as sizzle with an acrid hiss... That couldn't possibly be my imagination. I wanted to believe it was. Yeah.
``Prepare yourself... Satokooooo!!!``
``H-hyaaaaaaah!?!``
She's going to be killed -- she is definitely going to be killed?! Paralyzed with fear by that overwhelming aura, Satoko bolted away at the speed of a startled rabbit. However--
``On it!!``
At Shion's command, Tomita-kun and Okamura-kun sprang to their feet simultaneously and blocked the classroom entrance.
``Wha?!@k@vS14/04/210400076. T-Tomita-san? Okamura-san??``
``Sorry, Houjou!``
``Nothing personal -- please forgive us!``
``W-why...? Wait!?!``
When Satoko whipped around in alarm, Shion stood a few paces behind her, airily waving a colorful slip of paper near her lips.
Printed on it in large, eye-catching letters: 'Dessert Fest All-You-Can-Eat Invitation Ticket'!!
``Let me throw your own words right back at you.@k@vS14/06/210600114. 'A trump card must be saved for the very last moment.'@k@vS14/06/210600115. Hee hee hee...``
``A-au au au au au au au au...``
...Elapsed time: eighteen minutes. Satoko Houjou -- resignation.
Incidentally, the betting pool ended without a single winner.
``Tch~, and this time the house was supposed to take it all~~!``
Mion returned to her seat looking frustrated and popped a meatball into her mouth.
``M-Mii-chan...``
A little imp... there's a little imp sitting right there...
Even Rena wore a complicated expression -- half strained smile, half sheer exasperation.
``Mion, don't you think that was going a bit far...?``
``It's fiiine.@k@vS14/03/210300057. Satoko's a club member too, you know -- she needs to be able to withstand at least this level of trial.``
``And Shion is even more of a non-issue. Something like this is nothing to her!``
``Sis... I pray that divine punishment finds its way to you someday.``
Shooting a resentful glare Mion's way, Shion handed Satoko a paper napkin.

With Rena suggesting that 'an all-squash lunch is just cruel' and everyone acknowledging Satoko's spirited counterattack, Satoko managed to score a generous heap of meatballs. Her teary-eyed face from moments ago was nowhere to be seen...
changeReason: Original focuses on Rena offering Satoko a meatball; new translation describes a collective acknowledgment of Satoko's counterattack resulting in a generous heap of meatballs, changing who acts and the scale.

TextENGNew: She sat there rubbing her stomach with a contented smile.
Well... all things considered, I think they make a good pair. Surprising as it was at first, if someone told me they were actually sisters, nobody would doubt it for a second.
``Still, things sure get lively when Shion's around!@k@vS14/01/210100035. Why don't you just officially transfer here?``
``Ahahahaha!@k@vS14/06/210600118. I'd love nothing more, but there's no way Granny would allow it.``
``Spare me!@k@vS14/04/210400080. Even your occasional visits cause an uproar -- if it were every day, every hour, my body simply couldn't take it! Blegh.``
``How about an asparagus lunch tomorrow, then?@k@vS14/06/210600120. Raw, of course. With just mayonnaise.``
``F-fwaaaaaaah!@k@vS14/04/210400082. R-Rena-saaaan, Shion-san is bullying meee~~!!``
``H-hauuu~~! Satoko-chan's crying face is sho kyute!@k@vS14/02/210200031. Don't worry, Rena will--``
``Oh my, what do we have here?@k@vS14/06/210600122. Dessert Fest invitation tickets...``
*swoosh!*
``You really should listen to what your big sister says, you know? Hau~.``
That was fast! A total 180 in the blink of an eye?! And she's already got the tickets in her hand! ...Wait, has Shion already figured out exactly how to handle Rena?!
``How cowardly!@k@vS14/04/210400084. Buying people's loyalty with gifts!!``
``Ahahaha! The sound of this underdog's whining is music to my ears!!``
``Sh-Shion-san, you're a tyrant!@k@vS14/04/210400086. Rikaaaa, please, say something here--``
Yes, it was a lively, raucous lunch break, same as always.
And beyond that, there were the fun-filled afternoons of goofing around and competing in dead-serious club activities.
Normally, there would be one more person here -- quiet and unassuming, but with a definite presence. For about a week now, though... she had been standing... outside our circle.
changeReason: Original says Rika 'wasn't here' (absent); new translation says she 'had been standing outside our circle' (present but distanced), conveying a meaningfully different picture.

TextENGNew: When I first transferred here, she and Satoko would team up to tease me constantly, yet at the same time, she was always looking out for me in her own way.
But for some reason... starting one particular day, she suddenly put distance between us.
Could I have done something to make her dislike me? ...I considered that possibility and even asked Mion, but apparently that wasn't the case.
Besides, I wasn't the only one she'd grown distant from. It was the same with Mion, Rena, and above all, her own housemate, Satoko...
``...Seriously though, what's gotten into Rika-chan...?``
``Mm, well... they say this year's colds are pretty nasty.@k@vS14/03/210300061. Fussing over her too much and making her push herself would only make things worse.``
...That's what Mion said, but deep down, we all knew the truth.
The reason Rika-chan wasn't her usual self was that something was weighing on her mind.
And precisely because of that, as much as I wanted to help... without knowing what her troubles actually were, there was nothing any of us could do.
``So, where is Rika-chama right now?``
``Who knows... her bag's still here, so I don't think she's gone home.``
``Oh, Sato--``
Noticing Satoko looking downcast beside her, Shion started to say something. But Satoko lifted her head as if shaking off the gloom, and spoke up with a bright, cheerful smile.
``There's really nothing to worry about!@k@vS14/04/210400090. She ate a proper dinner with me just last night, so I'm sure her cold will be better in no time.``
``Satoko-chan...``
``...I see.@k@vS14/01/210100038. If Satoko says so, then it must be true!@k@vS14/01/210100039. All right, when her cold clears up, let's throw a big get-well celebration together!!``
``Right? Right!@k@vS14/02/210200037. When that time comes, Rena's gonna pull out all the stops!``
``Ahahahaha!@k@vS14/03/210300064. Then this old man will have a feast prepared and ready to go!``
``Ohhh! Mion's grand feast~~ *drool*!@k@vS14/01/210100041. And of course, none for Satoko!@k@vS14/01/210100042. I'm eating it all!!``

``Oh ho ho ho ho!@k@vS14/04/210400092. Keiichi-san, you haven't changed a bit!!@k@vS14/04/210400093. I've been forged in the fires of the wicked Shion-san's training -- do you really think I'd surrender so easily?!``
``Whoooo are you calling wiiiicked~~?!``
``F-fwaaaaaaah!!@k@vS14/04/210400095. Ow ow ow ow, owwww~~!!@k@vS14/04/210400096. G-grinding your knuckles into my head is foul plaaay~~~!!``
changeReason: Original says 'a direct blow to the head'; new translation specifies 'grinding your knuckles into my head,' describing a different physical action (punch vs noogie).

TextENGNew: ``Ahahahahahaha!!!``
And so our boisterous lunch break rolled merrily along.
Rika-chan... I don't know what's troubling you, but all of us are waiting for you to open up to us whenever you're ready.
